import React from 'react'; import './MentorProfileModal.css'; const MentorProfileModal = ({ mentor, onClose, onRequestSession }) => { if (!mentor) return null; return (
e.stopPropagation()}>

{mentor.name}'s Profile

{mentor.name}

{mentor.title}

⭐ {mentor.rating} Rating 👥 {mentor.sessions} Sessions 📅 {mentor.experience} Experience

About

{mentor.bio}

Specializations

{mentor.specialization?.map((skill, index) => ( {skill} ))}
{mentor.achievements && (

Achievements

    {mentor.achievements.map((achievement, index) => (
  • 🏆 {achievement}
    • ))}
)} {mentor.education && (

Education

{mentor.education}

)} {mentor.languages && (

Languages & Technologies

{mentor.languages.map((language, index) => ( {language} ))}
)} {mentor.tools && (

Tools & Platforms

{mentor.tools.map((tool, index) => ( {tool} ))}
)}

Contact & Availability

Platform: {mentor.platform}

Availability: {mentor.availability === 'Available' ? '✅ Available' : '🟡 Limited'}

Hourly Rate: {mentor.hourlyRate}

{mentor.email &&

Email: {mentor.email}

} {mentor.linkedin && (

LinkedIn:{' '} View Profile

)} {mentor.website && (

Website:{' '} Visit Website

)}
); }; export default MentorProfileModal;
